tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file in the current chat project folder (code/, files/, etc.)

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file in the current chat project folder. Required args: path (relative, e.g. code/asteroids.html), content (full file text). Bare filenames like game.html are stored under code/.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List a directory in the current chat project folder

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file in the current chat project folder (e.g. media/ copy of a video). Path is relative to the session project. Requires approval.

tools.name: file_info
tools.description: Stat a file or folder in the chat project (size, modified time). Args: path.

tools.name: copy_file
tools.description: Copy a file within the chat project. Args: src (or from), dest (or to).

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move/rename a file within the chat project. Args: src (or from), dest (or to).

tools.name: grep_files
tools.description: Search file contents in the chat project with a regex. Args: pattern; optional path (subdir), max_files, max_matches.

tools.name: glob_files
tools.description: Find files by pattern in the chat project (e.g. **/*.ts). Args: pattern; optional path.

tools.name: run_python
tools.description: Execute Python in the unified venv. Args: code (inline) OR path (e.g. code/script.py) with sessionId. Use after write_file to test scripts. Requires approval.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Run a shell command and return output in the chat terminal. Args: command (required); optional cwd. Requires shell permission.

tools.name: run_process
tools.description: Run a single program with args (no shell). Args: executable; optional argsJson, cwd. Requires shell permission.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: HTTP GET a URL (requires web fetch enabled)

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for a person, topic, or question. Args: query. Requires web fetch in Settings, or use browser_navigate + browser_snapshot.

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Open a URL in the Omega browser (visible in Browser tab)

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Get URL, title, and visible text from the current browser page

tools.name: image_generate
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt in the chat session (sessionId, prompt). Uses the chat model when it supports images; otherwise uses the Content Studio image model from Models → Model roles.

tools.name: audio_generate
tools.description: Synthesize speech (TTS) from text and show an audio player in chat. Args: sessionId; optional text, tts_voice_gender, tts_language, narration_tone, tts_pitch. Runtime shows voice option cards and a text input when the script is missing.

tools.name: finetune_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a base model and get suggested fine-tune modality + hyperparameters

tools.name: finetune_prepare_dataset
tools.description: Format dataset files for a fine-tune modality (paths separated by ;)

tools.name: finetune_start
tools.description: Create and start a fine-tune job (modelId, sources paths, optional modality)

tools.name: finetune_status
tools.description: Get fine-tune job status and recent logs (optional jobId)

tools.name: finetune_stop
tools.description: Stop a running fine-tune job

tools.name: content_create_run
tools.description: Queue a Content Studio video from chat. Args: theme (required); optional max_duration_seconds when the user stated length. sessionId is auto-injected from the active chat. Runtime shows briefing, script, then GPU mode — never pass project_id, agent_gpu_mode, or briefing_confirmed.

tools.name: content_run_status
tools.description: Poll Content Studio job status by job_id.

tools.name: content_delete_project
tools.description: Delete a Content Studio video project (DB record). Args: project_id from the chat card, or job_id. Optional delete_storage=true to remove render files on disk. Chat media/: list_dir + delete_file.

tools.name: content_storage_report
tools.description: Report Content Studio on-disk storage usage (renders under ~/.omega/.../storage). Optional project_id. No deletion.

tools.name: content_storage_cleanup
tools.description: Remove Content Studio render folders on disk. Default dry_run=true. Args: project_id or job_id; or orphans_only=true; or older_than_days=N. Pass dry_run=false and confirm=true to delete.

tools.name: content_free_gpu
tools.description: Unload Content Studio generation models from GPU VRAM (TTS / image). Optional reload_chat_model=true to reload the chat model afterward.

tools.name: content_list_projects
tools.description: List Content Studio video projects.

tools.name: content_schedule_create
tools.description: Create a cron schedule for a project or series. Args: cron_expression, project_id or series_id, optional timezone.

tools.name: content_schedule_list
tools.description: List Content Studio publish/generation schedules.

tools.name: content_series_list
tools.description: List Content Studio recurring series (theme + episode cadence).

tools.name: content_series_create
tools.description: Create a recurring series. Args: title, theme, optional default_max_duration_seconds (e.g. 60 for Shorts).

tools.name: content_social_publish
tools.description: Queue cross-platform social post. Args: platform (youtube|tiktok|instagram|x|facebook|linkedin|threads), title, optional caption, project_id, publish_now.

tools.name: content_social_platforms
tools.description: List supported social platforms and connection hints.

tools.name: search_local_media
tools.description: Smart-search audio/video on this PC (Music, Videos, Downloads, Pictures, configured library — not full-disk unless wide). Args: query; optional folder, audio_only.

tools.name: search_local_files
tools.description: Smart-search files by category: audio, video, media, image, code, document, any. Uses OS-typical folders (Music, Videos, project dir for code) before wide scan. Args: query; optional category, folder, wide=true, limit.

tools.name: play_local_media
tools.description: Play local audio or video from this PC in the chat media player. Use when the user wants files on disk (Music/Videos/Downloads), said "locally"/"on my PC", or named a track to find locally. Args: query (title/filename) OR path (from search). Not for vague "play some music" — use chat_choice_card first.

tools.name: play_youtube
tools.description: Play YouTube in the chat media player (auto-picks top search result). Args: query (song/artist) or url (watch link). Do not send the user to browse results.

tools.name: download_youtube_audio
tools.description: Download audio (MP3) from a YouTube link to Music/Omega Downloads. Requires yt-dlp on the PC. Args: url (watch link). Optional: output_dir. After download, use play_local_media with the saved path.

tools.name: media_status
tools.description: Get current media player state (local / youtube / idle).

tools.name: media_stop
tools.description: Stop the in-app media player overlay.

tools.name: show_chat_media
tools.description: Re-open the in-chat media review panel for the latest video in this session (Content Studio MP4 or generated video). Use when the user closed the viewer and wants the video back. Optional job_id.

tools.name: browser_stealth_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL with headless Chromium (playwright-core) for bot-protected pages.

tools.name: http_request
tools.description: HTTP request with method/headers/body

tools.name: clipboard_read
tools.description: Read system clipboard text

tools.name: clipboard_write
tools.description: Write text to system clipboard

tools.name: datetime
tools.description: Get current date/time in system local timezone (optional tz: IANA name e.g. Europe/Lisbon)

tools.name: math
tools.description: Evaluate a math expression

tools.name: parse_json
tools.description: Parse JSON and optionally extract a dotted path

tools.name: system_info
tools.description: OS / CPU / memory / hostname info

tools.name: omega_disk_usage
tools.description: Report disk usage for Omega profile areas (Content Studio storage, chat projects, cache, plugins). No deletion.

tools.name: chat_read_cache
tools.description: Read cached messages from a chat session. Args: session_id (optional, default active), limit (default 20).

tools.name: chat_manage
tools.description: Manage chat sessions: action=list|read|create|rename|delete. Args vary by action (session_id, title, model_id).

tools.name: chat_choice_card
tools.description: Show a dynamic choice card in chat. Args: prompt, options (JSON array of {id,label,value,description?}), allow_custom?, multi_select?

tools.name: chat_list
tools.description: List all chat sessions (id, title, model). Alias for chat_manage action=list.

tools.name: list_tools
tools.description: List all tools you can call (builtin, plugins, MCP). Use first when unsure what Omega can do.

tools.name: omega_capabilities
tools.description: Static map of Omega platform areas and which tool to call for each (no live state).

tools.name: plugin_catalog
tools.description: List installable Omega plugins that add new tools.

tools.name: install_plugin
tools.description: Install a plugin from the built-in catalog. Args: pluginId (from plugin_catalog).

tools.name: search_plugin_catalog
tools.description: Search built-in plugin catalog by keyword (args: query).

tools.name: write_plugin
tools.description: Author a plugin under ~/.omega/plugins/. Args: pluginId, name, toolsJson (JSON array of {name,description}), source (index.js CommonJS). Optional: description, version, permissions (fetch,fs-read,fs-write,network,subprocess). User must approve in chat.

tools.name: reload_plugins
tools.description: Hot-reload all plugins from disk; returns mounted tools (no app restart).

tools.name: extend_capability
tools.description: Self-extension flow: record gap → search catalog → install or write_plugin or create_skill. Args: goal, gap; optional pluginId, toolsJson, source, skillName, skillBody. User must approve in chat.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List agent skill playbooks (~/.omega/skills).

tools.name: read_skill
tools.description: Read full SKILL.md body. Args: skillId.

tools.name: create_skill
tools.description: Create a new agent skill playbook. Args: name, body; optional description, category, tags (comma-separated). User must approve in chat.

tools.name: record_capability_gap
tools.description: Log a missing capability for future extension. Args: goal, gap; optional suggestion (plugin/skill/tool idea).

tools.name: inference_status
tools.description: Full Ωmega inference snapshot: active model, backend (native GGUF / runtime / Ollama), loaded models, GPU, runtime & Ollama processes. Use when asked what model you are or what is running.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List local GGUF/safetensors models, bundled Ollama models, and configured remote providers. Args: optional limit (default 80).

tools.name: load_model
tools.description: Load a model into memory (switch active inference model). Args: modelId (e.g. mymodel.gguf or ollama:llama3). Runs without user prompt — use freely between subtasks.

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload model weights from GPU/RAM. Args: optional modelId (defaults to current active model). Runs without user prompt — free VRAM before heavy jobs.

tools.name: estimate_model_memory
tools.description: Estimate GPU/RAM needed to run a GGUF with current config. Args: modelId.

tools.name: delegate_to_agent
tools.description: Delegate a subtask to a workforce agent (agentId, task).

tools.name: run_moa
tools.description: Mixture-of-agents: parallel drafts + synthesis (task).

tools.name: plan_tasks
tools.description: Split a goal into JSON steps [{agentId, task}, …] (goal).

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search Omega long-term memory (FTS)

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Semantic search over indexed RAG documents

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Save a fact/preference into long-term memory
